message: 🌱 Add kuma: Support path prefix configuration for the GUI  mission (#680)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kuma-3600-support-path-prefix-configuration-for-the-gui",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kuma: Support path prefix configuration for the GUI ",
+    "description": "Support path prefix configuration for the GUI . This issue affects 3+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kuma troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kuma deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kuma -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma -n kuma --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kuma configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kuma configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kuma -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma\nkubectl get configmap -n kuma -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kuma\n```\n### Description\n\nRight now Kuma GUI expects that Kuma API is under same path without `/gui` prefix."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support path prefix configuration for the GUI ",
+        "description": "### Summary\nThis PR adds the GUI URL in the index API response.\n### Full changelog\n\n* [Implement ...]\n* [Fix ...]\n\n### Issues resolved\n\nFix #3280\n\n### Documentation\r\n\n### Testing\r\r\r\r\n\n### Backwards compatibility\n```yaml\n{\n  \"apiBaseUrl\": \"http://localhost:5681/api\",\n  \"guiBasePath\": \"/gui\"\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Support path prefix configuration for the GUI  is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuma -n kuma --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kuma --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Summary\nThis PR adds the GUI URL in the index API response.\n### Full changelog\n\n* [Implement ...]\n* [Fix ...]\n\n### Issues resolved\n\nFix #3280\n\n### Documentation\r\n\n### Testing\r\r\r\r\n\n### Backwards compatibility",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n  \"apiBaseUrl\": \"http://localhost:5681/api\",\n  \"guiBasePath\": \"/gui\"\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kuma",
+      "sandbox",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kuma"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kumahq/kuma/issues/3600",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kumahq/kuma",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kumahq/kuma/pull/3675"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kuma installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
